summary: Task-Based Payment System testing completed successfully. All 22 backend API tests passed. Full UI workflow verified: Task creation, status transitions (Assigned→In Progress→Completed→Verified), filters, view details, and payroll integration with Task Pay column.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1 x -1) - minor UX issue, non-blocking
Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent - accessibility warning, non-blocking

seed_data_creation: Created task 'UI Test - Create product mockup' for John Doe, LKR 12,000, category: design - verified and included in payroll PAY-202603-0006
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Assignment feature fully functional. Existing verified tasks: TASK-202603-0001 (LKR 5,000) and TASK-202603-0013 (LKR 12,000) for John Doe. Task Assignments page at /task-assignments. Stats cards show Total Tasks, Assigned, In Progress, Awaiting Verification, Verified (Unpaid), and Pending Payment amount. Payroll details view includes Task Pay column showing task payment amounts in purple.
